title: baissea subsessilis
intro: Baissea subsessilis is a flowering plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Baissea subsessilis is known to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including wound healing and pain relief. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments.
